zh.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys是Gwyn和Mrs. Gwyn ?的女兒，於0991年出生在英國威爾斯波斯。她於大約1010年與Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1032年在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾利安代洛享年41歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys是Gwyn和Mrs. Gwyn ?的女儿，于0991年出生在英国威尔斯波斯。她于大约1010年与Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1032年在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾利安代洛享年41岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: Nest
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Gwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

variants.name: Gwynn
meanings: Originally a byname from Welsh gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’. See also Wyn .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Powys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Powis
meanings: Welsh (now mainly West Midlands of England): habitational name from the region of Powis in mid Wales (from Old Welsh powes ‘country dwellers’).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys was born in 0991, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Gwyn and Mrs. Gwyn ?. She married Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan about 1010, in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1032, in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales: Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys est née en 0991, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Gwyn et Mrs. Gwyn ?. Elle a épousé Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan environ 1010, à Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1032, à Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys wurde 0991 in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Gwyn und Mrs. Gwyn ? geboren. Sie hat um 1010 in Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1032 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan circa 1010, nel Cardiganshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1032, nel Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powysは0991年にイギリスウェールズポウイスでGwynとMrs. Gwyn ?の娘として生まれた。約1010年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアでSeisyll Ap Rhun Fychanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1032年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランデイロで41歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys(은)는 0991년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 Gwyn(와)과 Mrs. Gwyn ?의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1010년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르에서 Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1032년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 랜데이로에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys nasceu em 0991, em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Gwyn e Mrs. Gwyn ?. Ela casou-se com Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan aproximadamente 1010, em Cardiganshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1032, em Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys родилась в 0991 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Gwyn и Mrs. Gwyn ?. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan около 1010 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1032 г. в местности лландилоу, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad Nest verch Gwyn of Powys nació en 0991, en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Gwyn y Mrs. Gwyn ?. Se casó con Seisyll Ap Rhun Fychan aproximadamente 1010, en Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1032, en Llandeilo, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
